list.name: Default Changelist
list.comment:
App2 - LoginScreen
- Login field validation alongside Hilt and MockK testing - LoginStatus is set, but the UI doesn't react to it yet.

Tests.backButtonDisplayed().executor": "Run", "Android Instrumented Tests.canTypeInEmail().executor": "Run", "Android Instrumented Tests.canTypeInPassword().executor": "Run", "Android Instrumented Tests.emailEmptyTextDisplaysWhenLoggingInWithEmptyEmail().executor": "Run", "Android Instrumented Tests.emailFieldDisplays().executor": "Run", "Android Instrumented Tests.loginButtonClickable().executor": "Run", "Android Instrumented Tests.loginButtonDisplays().executor": "Run", "Android Instrumented Tests.loginDescriptionDisplays().executor": "Run", "Android Instrumented Tests.passwordFieldDisplays().executor": "Run", "Android Instrumented Tests.photosBackNavigatesToLogin().executor": "Run", "Android Instrumented Tests.responseContainsManyProducts().executor": "Run", "Android Instrumented Tests.responseContainsOneProduct().executor": "Run", "Android Instrumented Tests.titleDisplayed().executor": "Run", "Android Instrumented Tests.welcomeMessageDisplays().executor": "Run", "Gradle.Configure Daemon JVM Criteria.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LoginValidatorTest.emptyEmailReturnsEmailError.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LoginValidatorTest.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LoginViewModelTest.emailErrorStateWhenInvalid.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LoginViewModelTest.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LoginViewModelTest.successfulLoginTriggersLoginEvent.executor": "Run", "Gradle.ProductClientTest.clientReceivesResponse.executor": "Run", "Gradle.ProductParserTest.responseDoesNotContainAnyProducts.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Tests in 'SBTechincalTest.app.unitTest'.executor": "Run", "GradleDaemonJvmCriteriaMigrationNotification.isNotificationDisabled": "true", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "ResourceManagerPrefKey.ModuleName": "SBTechincalTest.app.main", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "com.google.services.firebase.aqiPopupShown": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "take-two", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/sloco/AndroidStudioProjects/Pion-android-tech-test/Code", "project.structure.last.edited": "Modules", "project.structure.proportion": "0.17", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.2", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "inlay.hints", "sml.agent.feedback.1783175006129-48a08eae-0aaa-4ca0-9b4a-c7f9563fdb31": "true" } }

task.summary: Default task

Login Screen
- Login screen added - Email and password fields added and validated on clicking "log in" - Logged in state triggered when email and password are valid - Hilt added for dependency injection

Login -> Photos navigation
- Navigation library added using Gemini
- Navigation routes for Login and Photos added - We can now navigate to and from Photos
Committing TestTODOs as a record of my thought process.

Photos Screen
- Back button and title added

Photos Screen
- Loading state added

Photos Screen
- Loading state added

Photos Screen
- Ktor added to the project - Product request added, which is parsed to a PhotoCard
Product and PhotoCard share the same fields, but the classes have different intentions.

Photos Screen
- Coil added to the project for AsyncImage loading

Photos Screen
- Thumbnail and title visible on the Photos screen

Photos Screen
- Replacing deprecated hiltViewModel initialisation

Photos Screen
- Added error logging if the product parsing fails - Each photo card has a random coloured background - UI cleanup to closer match the example image - ProductParser no longer catches JSONExceptions, expecting the consumer to handle errors of that kind.

Photos Screen
- Added exception catching to the Ktor client. If the exception was a CancellationException, we need to allow the coroutine to cancel correctly.

Photos Screen
- UI adjustments for system padding
- Error state manages its own retry enabled, disabling the retry button for this instance of Error (example for when component states become larger)
- Photo request will only trigger if we are not already retrieving data.

Photos Screen
- Added search field - Added id field to Product and PhotoCardState to use as the key for the lazyColumn - Created general OutlinedTextFieldThemed.kt for use on Login and Photos

Photos Screen
- Search field moved to the results section so it doesn't appear while loading or after an error.
- Increased the size of the error icon

Photos Screen
- Preview fixes

Photos Screen
- Preview fixes - Removed the search bar into ReadyContent for consistency.

Final Thoughts
- Added future_considerations to explain where I would go from here to improve the task.

App2
I feel like the initial app module was rushed, expecting it to need to be checked quickly.
App2 is a 2nd attempt, where time and test pressure is off.
LoginScreen - Added welcome title, description, email and password fields, and the login button with testing.

MESSAGE.value:
Login Screen
- Login screen added - Email and password fields added and validated on clicking "log in" - Logged in state triggered when email and password are valid - Hilt added for dependency injection

Login -> Photos navigation
- Navigation library added using Gemini
- Navigation routes for Login and Photos added - We can now navigate to and from Photos
Committing TestTODOs as a record of my thought process.

Photos Screen
- Back button and title added

Photos Screen
- Loading state added

Photos Screen
- Ktor added to the project

Photos Screen
- Ktor added to the project - Product request added, which is parsed to a PhotoCard
Product and PhotoCard share the same fields, but the classes have different intentions.

Photos Screen
- Coil added to the project for AsyncImage loading

Photos Screen
- Thumbnail and title visible on the Photos screen

Photos Screen
- Replacing deprecated hiltViewModel initialisation

Photos Screen
- Added error logging if the product parsing fails - Each photo card has a random coloured background - UI cleanup to closer match the example image - ProductParser no longer catches JSONExceptions, expecting the consumer to handle errors of that kind.

Photos Screen
- Added exception catching to the Ktor client. If the exception was a CancellationException, we need to allow the coroutine to cancel correctly.

Photos Screen
- UI adjustments for system padding
- Error state manages its own retry enabled, disabling the retry button for this instance of Error (example for when component states become larger)
- Photo request will only trigger if we are not already retrieving data.

Photos Screen
- Added search field - Added id field to Product and PhotoCardState to use as the key for the lazyColumn - Created general OutlinedTextFieldThemed.kt for use on Login and Photos

Photos Screen
- Search field moved to the results section so it doesn't appear while loading or after an error.
- Increased the size of the error icon

Photos Screen
- Preview fixes

Photos Screen
- Preview fixes - Removed the search bar into ReadyContent for consistency.

Final Thoughts
- Added future_considerations to explain where I would go from here to improve the task.

App2
I feel like the initial app module was rushed, expecting it to need to be checked quickly.
App2 is a 2nd attempt, where time and test pressure is off.
LoginScreen - Added welcome title, description, email and password fields, and the login button with testing.

App2 - LoginScreen
- Login field validation alongside Hilt and MockK testing - LoginStatus is set, but the UI doesn't react to it yet.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
App2 - LoginScreen
- Login field validation alongside Hilt and MockK testing - LoginStatus is set, but the UI doesn't react to it yet.
